---
title: "Tadano appointed Group Leader at NIMS"
date: 2024-04-01
categories: [appointment]
---

Tadano has been appointed as the Group Leader of the Spin Theory Group at NIMS.
We continue theoretical and computational studies on fundamental aspects of physics
involving spin and lattice dynamics, in collaboration with experimental groups.

*(Sample post — the remaining ~19 news items are migrated in Phase 4.)*
